strengths: 15+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js/React (Optilyz, RIDE, WatchUp) far exceeding 6-year requirement
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Deep testing/TDD background — authored Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner; practiced TDD/trunk-based dev at RIDE
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
No explicit Vitest or PostgreSQL mention (MongoDB present; testing frameworks not named)
Kotlin not mentioned (Java present but dated; secondary stack gap)
response.justification: Candidate strongly matches the core competencies: TypeScript/Node.js fullstack (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq), React (Optilyz), AI-agent development with concrete MCP and agentic-workflow work at re:cinq, MongoDB and AWS CDK exposure, Docker/Kubernetes via GISCollective, and a documented testing/TDD discipline (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, TDD at RIDE). Experience volume (15+ years) easily clears the 6-year bar and senior IC profile. Gaps are framework-specific rather than competency-level: Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and PostgreSQL are not explicitly cited, though the underlying skills (Node backend frameworks, JS test tooling, JVM languages, relational DBs implied by SQL/MySQL) are present and learnable quickly given the track record.
